overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing Aloy walking through the tribal settlement of Thornmarsh. The character moves through wooden pathways and organic architecture built around massive trees, passing NPC villagers and colorful tribal banners, eventually discovering the Melee Pit location.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the entrance tunnel and emerging into the village proper

notable_agents.action: tribal guard standing at attention with spear
tribal guard standing at attention with spear

entered.detail: large archway decorated with colorful blue and red feathers marking the village entrance
rock walls covered in green moss and vegetation flanking the entrance
large basin filled with distinctive red-colored water visible beyond the entrance
massive ancient tree trunks with built structures rising in the distance
rustic wooden platforms and supports along the path

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered tunnel entrance flanked by mossy cliffs and two standing guard NPCs. As the camera moves forward, it passes under a colorful feathered archway and transitions into the open village, revealing a stunning view of a crimson water arena and massive tree structures in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: village overlook with crimson water arena

agents.ego_description: walking along the grassy overlook path with the crimson water basin visible to the right

notable_agents.action: villager walking along the path in the same direction

entered.detail: tall central spire built around a massive tree trunk with multiple levels
vibrant tribal banners hanging between structures
traditional dwelling with straw roof nestled among trees
suspended wooden bridge connecting elevated platforms

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open grassy overlook, the camera moves past colorful tribal banners and rustic structures. The crimson water arena remains visible to the right while the path curves toward a massive central tree tower with rope bridges connecting elevated huts.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded path through massive tree structures

agents.ego_description: walking through a shaded corridor formed by massive tree trunks and roots

entered.detail: natural archway formed by massive twisted tree roots
vertical surfaces completely covered in climbing vines and vegetation
weathered stone stairs embedded in the dirt path
tall narrow tower structure visible through the trees
tribal totem pole with colorful paint and carvings

segments.scene_description: The path narrows into a shaded corridor between massive tree trunks and ivy-covered walls. The camera passes under a natural root archway and by a decorated totem pole, with the crimson water arena no longer visible as the route winds through the dense village interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: melee pit arena with misty crimson water

events.description: discovers Melee Pit: Thornmarsh location, marked by on-screen text

agents.ego_description: approaching the melee pit arena where combatants are visible in the crimson water below

notable_agents.action: combatants fighting in the crimson water arena below

entered.detail: floating marker indicating the discovered melee pit location
elaborate wooden fighting platform extending over the water
lit torches lining the approach to the arena
massive gnarled roots forming natural seating areas

segments.scene_description: The path opens to reveal the Melee Pit arena, marked by a discovery notification. The camera approaches a misty crimson water basin where combatants can be seen fighting on a wooden platform. Burning torches and twisted tree roots frame the scene as spectators watch from the sidelines.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined cliffside entrance into the expansive, vibrant heart of a tribal settlement. It begins within a covered tunnel flanked by mossy cliffs and standing guards, moving forward under a colorful feathered archway. As the camera emerges into the open village, the view expands to reveal a striking crimson water arena and massive tree structures in the distance. The scene then shifts along a grassy overlook past rustic buildings and tribal banners, while the path curves toward a towering central tree connected by a network of rope bridges and elevated huts.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a shaded village corridor that gradually opens into a vibrant combat arena. It begins by winding through a narrow passage between massive tree trunks and ivy-covered walls, passing under a natural root archway and a decorated totem pole. As the route leads deeper into the village interior, the dense foliage and towering roots eventually give way to a wider clearing. The scene then expands to reveal the Melee Pit, where the camera approaches a misty crimson water basin framed by burning torches and twisted roots. Finally, the view settles on the arena's wooden platform where combatants fight before a crowd of spectators.
